data.title: Core CPI inflation exceeds 3%, but Fed rate cuts continue; S&P 500 increases.
data.description: Core CPI inflation rate has started increasing again, surpassing the 3% mark. Despite this uptick, it is not substantial enough to prevent Federal Reserve rate cuts. The S&P 500 experienced growth following this news.

data.title: Job cuts surged 140% from last year in July, with Fed's inflation gauge overshooting. S&P 500 rises.
data.description: In July, job cuts surged by 140% compared to the previous year. The Federal Reserve's preferred measure of inflation exceeded expectations. Following this news, the S&P 500 index saw gains in trading.

data.title: Fed could consider rate cut after EU tariff deal reduces inflation concerns triggered by Trump's deals.
data.description: Following President Trump's recent trade agreements, the Federal Reserve could be easing concerns about inflation driven by tariffs. This shift in sentiment may lead to the Fed considering a possible interest rate cut. The news comes shortly after the conclusion of a tariff deal with the European Union.

data.title: CPI data for June indicate inflation rising due to Trump tariffs, impacting S&P 500.
data.description: Inflation increased in June as a result of the Trump tariffs, as indicated by the consumer price index report. This rise in inflation was observed last month and is reflected in the latest data. The S&P 500 experienced a decline following the release of this information, signaling investor concern.

data.title: Trump announced tariffs of over 25% on Japan, South Korea, and 5 other nations, leading to S&P 500 decline.
data.description: Tariffs of 25% or higher have been imposed by President Trump on Japan, South Korea, and five other countries. The S&P 500 experienced a decline in response to the news.

data.title: ADP jobs report indicates weak hiring, rise in jobless claims, fueling expectations for Fed rate cuts.
data.description: The recent ADP jobs report and initial jobless claims confirm a trend of weak labor market performance, increasing expectations for prompt Federal Reserve interest rate reductions. The ADP jobs report reveals modest hiring activity, while jobless claims have risen, further supporting anticipations of Fed rate cuts.

data.title: SIT's new campaign promotes studying abroad in Europe to college students, aiming to inspire the next generation of global leaders.
data.description: Today in Brattleboro, Vermont, the School for International Training (SIT) has initiated a new campaign aimed at motivating college students to pursue studies abroad in Europe. The campaign titled "Step into the Map. Every Street Teaches" is urging undergraduate students to explore and immerse themselves in the European continent for academic purposes.

data.title: Sequel in STEM picture book series about bees and butterflies published by Brown Books Kids; focuses on life cycle, communication, self-acceptance.
data.description: In Dallas, award-winning author Debra Raso O’Connor blends the stages of a butterfly's life cycle with lessons on communication, change, and self-acceptance in her latest picture book "Annabelle Bee and Now There are Three" (Brown Books Kids). This installment in The Adventures of Annabelle Bee and Benjamin Butterfly series is aimed at young readers and emphasizes environmental awareness, problem-solving, and resilience. The book is now available, and O'Connor's storytelling aims to educate children through a mix of scientific exploration and valuable life lessons.

data.title: BW Energy considers acquiring Azule Energy's interests in Block 14/14K offshore Angola. No binding agreement yet.
data.description: A company under the BW Energy Group is in discussions to acquire Azule Energy’s non-operated interests in Block 14/14K located offshore Angola. This potential acquisition aligns with the Group’s strategy to acquire assets, although no official agreement has been made yet. It is important to note that there is no guarantee that this ongoing process will lead to a finalized transaction.

data.title: GitHub introduces Copilot Spaces for improved project collaboration, integrating project context, files, and pull requests for tailored developer assistance. General availability now.
data.description: GitHub Copilot Spaces has officially been launched, providing developers with a feature that boosts collaboration by integrating project-specific context, files, and pull requests for personalized support. The roll-out of GitHub Copilot Spaces aims to enhance developer productivity and streamline the development process.
